span_mappings.nl_span: the Fibonacci matrix has exact order 24 in GL₂(ZMod 9)

formal_statement:
theorem fib_mat_order_exact :
    ∀ k : Fin 24, k.val ≠ 0 → fib_mat ^ k.val ≠ 1
natural_language_claim: The Fibonacci matrix F = [[1,1],[1,0]] has exact multiplicative order 24 in GL₂(ZMod 9): for every k ∈ {1,...,23}, F^k ≠ I in M₂(ZMod 9).
